description: Style Note Heritage styling with a contemporary twist, this flying machine tee has a versatile appeal that you can style to match your mood. Pair this with your tried-and-true denims and  stilettos  on a lazy weekend. Product Details Grey t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a wide round neck, foldable sleeve with a pleated design and graphic print on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Delicate machine wash cold Do not bleach or tumble dry Hang dry in shade Warm iron on reverse Do not iron on print or embroidery Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size M
